perspectives.description: The rollerblader is the person who has been using their best friend's rollerblades and is now faced with the decision of whether to save up for their own pair or continue using their friend's without permission.
The best friend is the owner of the rollerblades being used and would be directly affected if they found out their rollerblades were being used without their knowledge.
The future friend is a potential new friend who might be introduced to the rollerblader and best friend, and could be affected by the dynamics of trust and honesty in their relationship.
